data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="Sodium Combustion in Air" goal="To observe the combustion of metallic sodium in air and the formation of sodium oxide." difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="crucible_1" type="crucible" />
      <Component id="crucible_tongs_1" type="tongs" />
      <Component id="tripod_1" type="tripod" />
      <Component id="pipeclay_triangle_1" type="pipeclay_triangle" />
      <Component id="alcohol_lamp_1" type="alcohol_lamp" />
      <Component id="tweezers_1" type="tweezers" />
      <Component id="safety_goggles_1" type="safety_goggles" />
      <Component id="gloves_1" type="gloves" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="Metallic_Sodium" state="solid" />
      <Reagent name="Sodium_Oxide_Product" state="solid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Attach vessel="pipeclay_triangle_1" support="tripod_1" id="step_0" />
      <Attach vessel="crucible_1" support="pipeclay_triangle_1" id="step_1" />
      <Insert tool="crucible_tongs_1" vessel="crucible_1" id="step_2" />
      <Add vessel="crucible_1" reagent="Na" mass="0.1 g" tool="tweezers_1" id="step_3" />
      <Heat vessel="crucible_1" tool="alcohol_lamp_1" id="step_4" />
      <Wait time="120s" id="step_5" />
      <Wait time="until sodium is fully combusted and white solid forms" id="step_6" />
      <Cool vessel="crucible_1" id="step_7" />
      <Wait time="60s" id="step_8" />
      <Add vessel="crucible_1" reagent="Na2O" mass="product" id="step_9" />
      <Wait time="observe white solid product" id="step_10" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 组装实验装置：将三脚架、泥三角和坩埚依次搭建好，并准备好坩埚钳以便后续操作。
向坩埚中准确加入金属钠，为后续燃烧实验做准备。
加热坩埚中的金属钠，观察其在空气中的燃烧过程，直至完全反应并生成白色固体产物。
冷却坩埚，观察并确认生成的白色固体产物（氧化钠）。
